offer: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, daily discrepancies cause late financial reporting. We automate bank statement matching instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: discrepancies between bank statements and internal records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
try_it: Let users try daily alerts and manual matching on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
